title: Travel & Accommodations | The Webb Schools | Private Boarding & Day School
content:
Travel and Accommodations
Travel & Accommodations
Here are some recommendations to help with your travel plans.
AIRPORTS
Ontario International Airport (ONT) is the closest airport to Webb, located approximately 12 miles away. It is the most convenient airport to fly into and is served by most major airlines and car rental agencies.
Other airports in the Los Angeles area include :
Los Angeles International Airport (LAX) — 52.5 miles away
John Wayne Airport (SNA) — 41 miles away
Hollywood Burbank Airport (BUR) — 40 miles away
Long Beach Airport (LGB) — 49 miles away
AIRPORT TRANSPORTATION
Student Services offers transportation services and assistance to/from all area airports for all official school breaks and at the beginning and end of the school year.
Travel arrangements for airport transportation to/from campus must be made in advance. In
mid-July
, a signup link will be emailed to you by the Dean's Office. Please contact Mr. Silva at
nsilva@webb.org
or (909) 482-5248 with any questions.
Seniors 18 years of age or older may use Rideshare services with permission granted by a parent or legal guardian. Please contact the Dean's Office if you have questions or concerns regarding rideshare permissions.
HOTELS
The DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel Claremont
555 West Foothill Blvd., Claremont, CA 91711
(909) 626-2411 or (800) 222-8733
Embassy Suites by Hilton Ontario Airport
3663 East Guasti Road, Ontario, California 91761
(909) 605-0281
Hotel Casa 425
425 W 1st St, Claremont, CA 91711
(866) 450-0425
